sections.biography-source-undefined: Liu Zhen was made District Marquis of Lucheng during the reign of Emperor Wu of Han, but was later convicted of neglecting to pay gold as tax for an imperial ceremony, and deposed.

full_text:
Liu Zhen 劉貞
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Zhen (劉貞). Had fief at Lucheng county. Convicted of neglecting to pay gold as tax for an imperial ceremony, and deposed. Liu Zhen was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.

Short Biography
Had fief at Lucheng county. Convicted of neglecting to pay gold as tax for an imperial ceremony, and deposed.

BiographySource Undefined
Liu Zhen was made District Marquis of Lucheng during the reign of Emperor Wu of Han, but was later convicted of neglecting to pay gold as tax for an imperial ceremony, and deposed.
